LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Atlantic.description: The Atlantic embody adaptability — forged by ocean winds and shifting tides. Their blood sings with salt and stubborn endurance.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Atlantic.label: atlantic soul
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Cascadia.description: Children of misty forests and basalt mountains. The Cascadians are unshaken by rain or solitude, ever patient and feral at heart.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Cascadia.label: cascadian wilds
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Ghoul.description: Scarred by centuries of decay, ghouls persist beyond reason; their will is the last thing to rot.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Ghoul.label: ghoul resilience
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_NatL.description: The Ninety-Nine Tribes carry ancestral echoes — every heart a drumbeat in a chorus of shared memory.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_NatL.label: nat'l diversity
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_NuevoTexico.description: Dust storms and refinery fumes forged the Texicans — weathered souls fueled by stubborn pride and old oil.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_NuevoTexico.label: texico grit
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Numen.description: The Numen are entwined with the land — their spirits a living testament to survival against all odds.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Numen.label: numen roots
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_PureHuman.description: The Pure Humans embody the resilience of unaltered humanity — a steadfast spirit that endures through every trial.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_PureHuman.label: human spirit
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Slanter.description: The Slanters drift between worlds — dreamers and schemers with eyes like broken glass, caught between memory and myth.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Slanter.label: slanter echo
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_SuperMutant.description: The Super Mutants’ strength is legend — a fusion of pain and pride that outlived their makers.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_SuperMutant.label: super mutant might
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_TwoCalifornia.description: Split between paradise and ruin, the Two Californians live in contradiction — both dreamers and survivors of their own myth.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_TwoCalifornia.label: two-californian duality
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_VaultDweller.description: Raised under steel and silence, the Vault Dwellers’ heritage is order — a longing for structure even in chaos.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_VaultDweller.label: vault heritage
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Wendigo.description: The Wendigo embody hunger made flesh — a spirit of endless wanting that no feast can sate.
LanguageData.WestTek_Gene_Wendigo.label: wendigo hunger
